title: Fix MLX multi-batch validation memory growth
author: yhn112

data.description: Materialize each MLX validation batch loss before accumulating it to avoid building one lazy graph across the entire validation split and causing memory growth.
Keep lightweight validation progress logging during long multi-batch validation runs so they do not appear hung.

novel_contributions: Fixed MLX validation memory growth when validation spans multiple batches by materializing each batch loss before accumulation.
Added lightweight validation progress logging to make long validation passes visibly progress.
